title: Drawing Robot for Kids,Montessori Educational Painting Toy for 5+ with Voice Interaction&16 Color Pens,Magic Drawing Robot with 100 Learning Word Cards,Ideal Gift for 5+ Year Old Boys Girls (Green)
features: ENLIGHTENMENT EDUCATION DRAWING ROBOT: Unleash your child's potential with our advanced drawing robot! It incorporates Montessori educational concepts and is designed to develop basic skills such as hand-eye coordination, writing, drawing, problem solving, creativity and imagination. It develops cognitive and artistic skills in an entertaining way and is the ultimate tool for children's fun learning at home.

EASY TO USE: Start the fun easily, no apps required! Just insert one of the 100 included drawing cards, which cover a variety of topics such as animals, plants, transportation, etc. Our robot can help children easily improve their graphic recognition and color perception abilities.

SAFE & ADORABLE DESIGN: Our top priority is your child's safety and enjoyment. The drawing robot showcases a delightful and engaging appearance while being constructed from premium, non-toxic materials. Its sturdy design ensures a secure play environment, allowing for peace of mind while your child explores their artistic talents.

IDEAL GIFT FOR CREATIVE MINDS: Perfect for children aged 5 and up, our painting robot is a great gift for developing early learning skills in painting, recognition and language. It is an ideal gift for Children's Day, birthdays, Christmas and any occasion that requires a fun and educational gift.

WHAT YOU GET: The drawing robot set includes everything your child needs to start creating: a drawing robot, 100 drawing cards, 16 colorful markers. We guarantee that our educational drawing robot is durable. Please handle the drawing cards carefully to maintain its functionality. If you encounter any problems, our professional customer service team will help you within 24 hours.
